---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working? (even a rough sketch helps)

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other approaches?

## Skill Impact

Which skills would this affect?

- [ ] book-genesis (orchestrator)
- [ ] character-forge
- [ ] theme-weaver
- [ ] emotion-engineer
- [ ] hook-crafter
- [ ] dialogue-master
- [ ] beta-reader-sim
- [ ] proofreader
- [ ] synopsis-writer
- [ ] cover-brief
- [ ] book-formatter
- [ ] query-letter
- [ ] series-architect
- [ ] New skill needed
